x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records actions and changes for compliance, traceability, and regulatory purposes.

Comment:
Example: Log of who approved a loan disbursement and when.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Activity Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records user, customer, or system activities related to transactions.

Comment:
Example: Customer initiates a funds transfer through online banking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Processing Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records the processing steps and status of a transaction.

Comment:
Example: Transaction received, validated, posted, and settled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records security-related events and access attempts.

Comment:
Example: Failed login before a payment transaction is initiated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Error Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records transaction failures, exceptions, and system errors.

Comment:
Example: Payment rejected due to insufficient funds.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records unusual or abnormal transaction events requiring attention.

Comment:
Example: Large transaction flagged for review.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorization Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records approval, rejection, and authorization activities.

Comment:
Example: Manager approves a high-value transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Validation Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records execution of business rules and validation checks.

Comment:
Example: Account ownership verification completed successfully.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records settlement and clearing activities.

Comment: 
Example: Interbank payment settled through a clearing network.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconciliation Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records matching and reconciliation results between systems.

Comment:
Example: Daily reconciliation of card transactions against settlement records.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Integration Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records messages exchanged between systems and applications.

Comment:
Example: Core banking system sends transaction details to the payment gateway.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Communication Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records notifications and communications related to transactions.

Comment:
Example: SMS confirmation sent after payment completion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Access Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records access to transaction records and services.

Comment:
Example: Operations staff views transaction details.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records performance and operational monitoring information.

Comment:
Example: Transaction processing time exceeds threshold.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud Monitoring Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records fraud detection and suspicious activity events.

Comment:
Example: Transaction flagged by anti-money laundering rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records activities performed to satisfy regulatory requirements.

Comment:
Example: Sanctions screening completed before transaction execution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Status Change Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records changes in transaction lifecycle status.

Comment:
Example: Transaction status changes from Pending to Executed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correction Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records transaction amendments, reversals, or adjustments.

Comment:
Example: Incorrect payment reversed and reposted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Archive Log
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Stores historical transaction records for long-term retention.

Comment:
Example:
Closed-year transaction history archived for regulatory retention.
